creator: steven_nikkel@ertyu.org
text:
Just did a fresh install of 11.1, afterwards system wouldn't find a bootable disk. Found mention of similar issue in 11.0 errata. Applied 'gpart set -a active ada0' and voila, system would boot from disk. Looks like I have yet another example of a system that needs the fix.

# kenv -q smbios.planar.maker
Intel Corporation
# kenv -q smbios.planar.product
D945GCLF2
